summary: Verified the derived series fix for Collection Organizer. All 8 backend tests passed. The fix correctly updates BOTH supplier_products AND tiles collections for products with derived series (where series field is null, empty, or missing and series name is derived from product_name).
test_credentials: No auth required for collection-organizer endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_DERIVED_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Derived series fix verified working. The fix uses $or queries in tile_conditions to match: 1) raw series field, 2) series=null with product_name starting with series, 3) series='' with product_name starting with series, 4) series field missing with product_name starting with series. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/assign, POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/unassign, POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/bulk-assign.

assign_endpoint: ✓ Updates ALL supplier_products including derived series (series=null, series='', series missing)
✓ Updates ALL tiles including derived series
unassign_endpoint: ✓ Clears category from ALL supplier_products including derived series
✓ Clears category from ALL tiles including derived series
bulk_assign_endpoint: ✓ Updates ALL products and tiles for multiple series including derived series
customer_facing: ✓ Assigned collections appear in tiles with correct sub_categories
✓ Unassigned collections are removed from tiles
edge_cases: ✓ series=null correctly matched via derived series logic
✓ series='' (empty string) correctly matched via derived series logic
✓ series field missing correctly matched via derived series logic
✓ Partial series names do NOT incorrectly match (word boundary regex)

fix_verification.bug_description: Collections assigned via Collection Organizer admin panel weren't appearing on customer-facing shop page for products with derived series
fix_verification.root_cause: db.tiles.update_many queries only matched tiles by raw series field, failing for suppliers with derived series (where series is null and first word of product_name is used)
fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated tile_conditions in assign, unassign, and bulk-assign endpoints to use $or queries matching both raw and derived series
fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All 8 tests passed, E2E verification confirmed fix working
